title: phlox diffusa subsp. longistylis
intro: Phlox diffusa subsp. longistylis is a plant species native to Mexico, belonging to the phlox genus and known for its medicinal properties. It is commonly used as a treatment for various ailments due to its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The plant's health benefits include its ability to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Traditionally, it has been prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for consumption, and its essential oils are also used in aromatherapy.
